dataset: EPA 40 CFR Part 98 emission factors; EPA eGRID 2022 electricity factors

pi_items.source: Calculated from facility_emissions.xlsx data: HQ Campus (OH) 3033.21 + East Distribution (PA) 2045.73 + West Warehouse (IL) 2172.35 + R&D Center (MA) 1488.54 = 8739.83 MT
Calculated as Total Scope 1+2 (8739.83 MT) × $50/MT = $436,991.50 (verified within rounding)
Calculated using NPV function with 8% discount rate: -$185,000 capital cost + PV of 10 years of $37,720 annual benefits = $68,104.27
Calculated using IRR function on cash flows: [-185000, 37720, 37720, ..., 37720] for 10 years = 15.61% IRR
Calculated using NPV function with 8% discount rate: -$650,000 capital cost + PV of 25 years of $98,040 annual benefits = $396,555.06
Calculated using IRR function on cash flows: [-650000, 98040, 98040, ..., 98040] for 25 years = 14.58% IRR
Calculated using IRR function on cash flows: [-420000, 51601.30, 51601.30, ..., 51601.30] for 15 years = 8.84% IRR
EPA 40 CFR Part 98, Subpart C, Table C-1 (Weighted U.S. Average for Natural Gas); used in spreadsheet row 13
EPA 40 CFR Part 98, Subpart C, Table C-1 (Distillate Fuel Oil No. 2); verified through EPA documentation
EPA eGRID 2022, RFCW (RFC West) subregion, CO2e output emission rate; used for OH/PA/IL facilities
EPA eGRID 2022, NEWE (New England) subregion, CO2e output emission rate; used for MA facility
Verified as realistic market rate: median corporate internal carbon price is ~$49-50/MT CO2e (2023-2024 range); consistent with US IWG Social Cost of Carbon estimates
Listed in Project_IRR sheet row 11 as cost assumption for project evaluation
Listed in Project_IRR sheet row 12 as cost assumption for project evaluation
Listed in Project_IRR sheet row 14 as WACC (Weighted Average Cost of Capital) for NPV calculations

privileged_info_summary: The carbon abatement task uses EPA 40 CFR Part 98 Table C-1 emission factors (53.06 kg CO2/MMBtu for natural gas, 10.21 kg CO2/gallon for diesel) and EPA eGRID 2022 regional electricity factors (0.000380 MT CO2e/kWh for RFCW, 0.000218 MT CO2e/kWh for NEWE). All expected results are mathematically correct: total company Scope 1+2 emissions of 8,739.83 MT CO2e, total carbon cost of $436,991.60 at $50/MT, LED project NPV of $68,104.27 with 15.61% IRR, Solar project NPV of $396,555.06 with 14.58% IRR, and HVAC project IRR of 8.84%. Facility data is representative/synthetic data for four manufacturing locations in Ohio, Pennsylvania, Illinois, and Massachusetts. All cost assumptions ($0.112/kWh electricity, $8.50/MMBtu gas, 8% discount rate) are explicitly stated in the worksheet.
